'''DoubleSec Corp''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technology manufacturing corporation. They constructed the [[Gravity compensator/Legends|Gravity Field Compensator]] used aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].<ref name="Riders" />

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
